title: IdentityLedgerAttestation
description: HUMAN-0 attestation record required for every IdentityLedger.ratify() call. Enforces MMEM-0.

governor.description: Full name of attesting governor. Must match HUMAN-0 record.

human0_digest.description: Non-null attestation digest — SHA-256 of canonical attestation payload. Presence enforces MMEM-0.

ledger_id.description: Identifier of the IdentityLedger being attested

statement_ids_attested.description: List of IdentityStatement IDs covered by this attestation

terminal_chain_hash_attested.description: The terminal chain_hash value the governor is attesting to. Must match IdentityLedger state at ratify() time.

scope.description: Human-readable description of what is being attested
